title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while I'm out with Bamboo Memory...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory points toward a claw machine
filled with Umamusume plushies called cuties.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Just looking at all of my rivals lined up like this is
pretty exciting!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I had some of these in my room, I could get
fired up anytime! Let's give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, the arm won't drop where I'm aiming it...
This is harder than I thought...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Aaagggh! Why did it fall?! I had it!

text_block_list.name: Shop Assistant
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Please don't shake the claw machine!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Urk... I got a little too excited there. I shouldn't
cause any more trouble...
choice_data_list: Let me give it a try.
Let me give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sure thing! You got this, Trainer! I'm cheering for
you!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Go, go, Trainer! Go, Trainer, go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
